fields.title: Homecare(Nurse / caretaker / maid)
fields.description: Homecare services provide professional care to patients in their own homes. This includes nursing care, personal care, and companionship. Homecare services are available for patients of all ages and conditions.

fields.title: 24/7 Emergency & First Aid Service
fields.description: Round-the-clock emergency response and first aid services available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, with just one phone call.

fields.title: Wound Dressing (Small, Medium, Large)
fields.description: Professional wound care and dressing services for minor to major wounds, ensuring proper healing and infection prevention.

fields.title: Pharmacy Dispensary
fields.description: Complete pharmacy services providing prescribed medicines, over-the-counter drugs, and essential medical supplies with professional guidance.

fields.title: Blood Sample Collection (All Tests)
fields.description: Professional blood sample collection services for all types of laboratory investigations conducted safely and hygienically.

fields.title: Intravenous Injection / Infusion
fields.description: Safe administration of intravenous injections and infusions for all types of prescribed medications.

fields.title: Surgical Goods Supply
fields.description: Supply of high-quality surgical goods and medical equipment required for procedures, home care, and emergency use.

fields.title: Doctor Consultation (MBBS, BDS, Specialists)
fields.description: Consultation with qualified doctors and specialists in various medical fields. Prior appointment is required for consultation services.

fields.title: Single-Bedded Observation Service
fields.description: Single-bed observation facility for short-term monitoring and medical supervision of patients.

fields.title: Cannulation
fields.description: Professional IV cannulation procedure performed by trained medical staff for medication and fluid administration.

fields.title: Intradermal / Intramuscular / Subcutaneous Injection
fields.description: Administration of intradermal, intramuscular, and subcutaneous injections following proper medical protocols.

fields.title: Catheterization (Foley’s Male/Female)
fields.description: Safe and sterile Foley catheter insertion procedure for both male and female patients.

fields.title: NG Tube / OG Tube Insertion
fields.description: Nasogastric (NG) and Orogastric (OG) tube insertion procedures performed by trained professionals.

fields.title: Easy Bag Procedure (Constipation Relief)
fields.description: Medical assistance for constipation relief through safe and hygienic easy bag procedure.

fields.title: Arterial Blood Gas (ABG) Collection
fields.description: Accurate arterial blood gas sample collection for critical diagnostic evaluation.

fields.title: Venous Blood Gas (VBG) Collection
fields.description: Venous blood gas sample collection for laboratory analysis and patient monitoring.

fields.title: Oxygen Supply
fields.description: Reliable oxygen cylinder supply for home care, emergency support, and medical needs.

fields.title: Physiotherapy Services
fields.description: Professional physiotherapy services available by prior appointment to support recovery and rehabilitation.

fields.title: Ambulance Service (EMS with Paramedics)
fields.description: Emergency ambulance services equipped with paramedics (EMS) to provide rapid medical response and patient transport.

fields.title: Helicopter & Flight Rescue (HEMS)
fields.description: Helicopter Emergency Medical Service (HEMS) with doctor, paramedics, nurses, and full medical equipment for critical rescue missions.
